info.title: PoolMaster API
info.description: Contest pool management platform — leagues, contests, drafts, scoring, and admin tools.

post.summary: Exchange refresh token for new access token

get.summary: Get current user profile from JWT
List leagues for the current user

post.summary: Send email invitations to join a league

put.summary: Change a member role and permissions

delete.summary: Remove a member from the league
Leave a league as the current member

post.summary: Transfer league ownership to another member

get.summary: Get commissioner dashboard for a league
Get audit log for a league
Get audit log for a specific member

post.summary: Copy contests from a previous season
Create a squad in a league
Add or reactivate a squad co-manager
Accept a league invitation using an invite code
Create a new contest in a league
Create a commissioner-managed contest with configuration

get.summary: Get the current user contest entry

post.summary: Create or return the current user contest entry

delete.summary: Delete the current user contest entry

post.summary: Extend the pick clock for the current drafter

get.summary: Get the audit log for a contest
Get all season records for a participant
Get a specific season record for a participant
Get top N standings summary for dashboard widgets
Get the current user's entry with rank context
Get roster history for an entry
Get member contest results within a league

post.summary: Record user consent for a policy type

get.summary: Get consent history for current user

post.summary: Apply credit to a tenant account
Force logout a user from all sessions
Override an entry score in a contest
Re-ingest scoring data for an event

get.summary: List sports data providers and health status

post.summary: Map an external participant to an internal ID
Trigger manual health check for a provider
Re-ingest event data from a provider
Mute an alert for a duration

put.summary: Update notification channel defaults for a category

get.summary: Get notification template by event type

post.summary: Reset a notification template to defaults
Reset all push triggers to defaults

get.summary: Get recommended poll intervals for clients

post.summary: Add a reaction to a post

get.summary: Get messages in a direct message conversation

patch.summary: Mark a direct message conversation as read

get.summary: Get current draft state for a contest

post.summary: Shift the current turn start time
Undo the most recent snake draft pick
Skip the current snake draft pick

get.summary: Get participant score history in a contest
List in-app notifications for current user
Get notification preferences for current user

post.summary: Register a device for push notifications

get.summary: List registered devices for current user

post.summary: Register a device for push notifications (alias)
Send commissioner announcement to a league
Schedule a notification for future delivery

delete.summary: Cancel scheduled notifications for a source

post.summary: Trigger data sync for a sport
Ingest scores for a sport event
Ingest results for a sport event
